headline: Is The Kroger Co. (KR) One of the Best Stocks to Buy Now For Good Returns amid Price Target Cuts?
summary: The Kroger Co. (NYSE:KR) is one of the best stocks to buy now for good returns. On June 22, Morgan Stanley reiterated an Equal Weight rating on the stock but cut the price target to $67 from $73 a share. The Kroger Co. (NYSE:KR) is currently trading at $58 a share.
